about.intro: Birds.name je višejezični vodič za imena ptica izgrađen na BirdNET-Pi prijevodnim datotekama, opisima s Wikipedije, IUCN podacima o zaštiti, medijima o pticama i osobnim bilješkama promatranja.
about.translationText: Neki jezici još trebaju bolje prijevode sučelja i ispravke imena ptica. Ako možete pomoći, otvorite pull request u GitHub repozitoriju. Ne znate kako? Pitajte AI da vas vodi kroz izradu PR-a.
about.uses: Koristite ga za pretraživanje ptica po lokalnom ili znanstvenom imenu, usporedbu imena među jezicima, provjeru statusa zaštite, vođenje privatnog dnevnika opaženih ptica i istraživanje statistike detekcija BirdNET-Pi ili BirdWeather.
action.saveWeather: Spremite ključ i učitajte vremensku prognozu
ai.connectionHelp: Pollinations će otvoriti svoju sigurnu stranicu za autorizaciju aplikacije. Prijavite se, pregledajte zahtjev za pristup i odobrite ga za povezivanje vašeg računa. Vaš račun i dalje kontrolira svoj proračun i pristup.
ai.costNotice: AI zahtjevi imaju cijenu, tako da operater web stranice ne može osigurati automatske prijevode za svakog posjetitelja. Možete odabrati želite li koristiti vlastiti Pollinations račun ili nastaviti bez umjetne inteligencije.
ai.descriptionIntro: Bird names may be available in your selected language while their descriptions are still only available in English. Pollinations AI can translate missing Wikipedia descriptions automatically, translate IUCN sections only when you click Translate, and summarize your diary observations when you request it.
ai.descriptionLoadedFromLocalStorage: AI translation from the English Wikipedia source, loaded from local storage.
ai.descriptionTranslatedBy: AI prijevod putem Pollinations iz engleskog izvora Wikipedije.
ai.englishFallback: Prevedeni opis nije dostupan na vašem odabranom jeziku, pa je prikazan engleski izvor.
ai.englishFallbackWithAi: Prevedeni opis nije dostupan na vašem odabranom jeziku, pa je prikazan engleski izvor. Omogućite AI prijevode iz izbornika za prijevod opisa na odabrani jezik.
ai.howItWorksText: Your key stays in this browser. Birds.name uses Pollinations AI only for optional Wikipedia description translations, clicked IUCN section translations, and diary observation summaries. Saved translations are cached locally to reduce repeated requests; diary summaries are generated only when you press Summarize.
ai.modelChangedReconnect: Model se promijenio. Ponovno povežite Pollinations za autorizaciju ovog tekstualnog modela.
ai.modelRecommendation: Ako ste u nedoumici, ostavite ovo nepromijenjeno na openai-fastu.
ai.noContextLimit: Oprašivanja trenutno ne navode ograničenje kontekstnog tokena za ovaj model.
ai.noUsage: Još nije zabilježen nijedan zahtjev za prijevod AI-ja.
ai.preferredLanguageHelp: Trenutno odabrani jezik enciklopedije koristi se kao početni izbor. Možete ga promijeniti ovdje.
ai.savedTranslationDeleted: Saved translation deleted. Checking the best available description again...
ai.savedTranslationNotFound: Saved translation was not found. Checking the best available description again...
ai.setupRequiredForIucn: Najprije postavite AI prijevod. IUCN odjeljci prevode se tek nakon povezivanja vašeg Pollinations računa, pa se tokeni koriste samo kada sami odaberete odjeljak.
birdweather.privacyNote: Your browser asks for permission. Coordinates are not saved by this website.

credits.birdlifeText: Znanje i resursi za očuvanje ptica
credits.birdnetMainMiddle: što je omogućilo BirdNET-Pi. Posebne pohvale idu
credits.birdnetMainSuffix: za nastavak i proširenje tog rada.
credits.birdnetTranslations: Imena i prijevodi ptica iz enciklopedije temelje se na lokalizacijskim datotekama BirdNET-Pi koje održava Nachtzuster.
credits.birdweatherText: Javna BirdNET stanica i podaci o detekciji
credits.ebirdText: Taksonomija, reference vrsta i resursi za promatranje
credits.intro: Ova web stranica je moguća zahvaljujući projektima otvorenog koda, podacima zajednice i kreativnim suradnicima.
credits.iucnText: Globalne procjene očuvanja, populacije, staništa i prijetnji
credits.origamiText: Ikone ptica koje je izradio Freepik - Flaticon
credits.pollinationsText: Izborni prijevodi opisa autorizirani od strane korisnika

donation.cta: Je li vam ova stranica korisna? Donacije su više nego dobrodošle.
donation.intro: Birds.name izrađuje jedan neovisni autor. Donacije pomažu s hostingom, održavanjem, testiranjem i vremenom potrebnim za daljnje poboljšanje stranice bez oglasa ili pratitelja.
donation.title: Podržite Birds.name

import.deleteSavedFileFailed: The saved uploaded file could not be deleted.
import.dropDescription: Drop a detection CSV, compressed export, TXT file, or BirdNET-Pi eBird checklist CSV from your own BirdNET-Pi exported backup files.

iucn.areaOfOccupancyHelp: Area of Occupancy (AOO): the area within the species range that it actually occupies, measured in square kilometres.
iucn.cr.description: Suočen s iznimno visokim rizikom od izumiranja u divljini.
iucn.cr.label: Kritično ugrožena
iucn.criteriaAi: a(i): no subpopulation exceeds the category-specific mature-individual threshold
iucn.criteriaAii: a(ii): most mature individuals occur in one subpopulation
iucn.criteriaBSub: b: extreme fluctuations in mature individuals
iucn.criteriaC: C: small population size and continuing decline
iucn.criteriaC2: C2: a continuing decline in mature individuals is observed, estimated, projected, or inferred
iucn.criteriaD: D: very small or geographically restricted population
iucn.dd.description: Dostupni podaci nedostatni su za procjenu rizika od izumiranja.
iucn.dd.label: Nedostatak podataka
iucn.en.description: Suočen s vrlo visokim rizikom od izumiranja u divljini.
iucn.en.label: Ugrožena
iucn.ew.description: Preživljava samo u zatočeništvu ili izvan svog prijašnjeg areala.
iucn.ew.label: Izumrli u divljini
iucn.ex.description: Nema razumne sumnje da je posljednja osoba umrla.
iucn.ex.label: Izumrli
iucn.extentOfOccurrenceHelp: Extent of Occurrence (EOO): the area inside the shortest continuous boundary encompassing the species known, inferred, or projected occurrence, measured in square kilometres.
iucn.lc.description: Procijenjeno i trenutno pod malim rizikom od izumiranja.
iucn.lc.label: Najmanja briga
iucn.menuIntro: IUCN Red List mjeri globalni rizik od izumiranja vrste. Odaberite kategoriju za prikaz ptica iz lokalno generiranog službenog skupa podataka IUCN.
iucn.nt.label: Gotovo ugroženo
iucn.vu.description: Suočen s velikim rizikom od izumiranja u divljini.
iucn.vu.label: Ranjiv

weather.addApiKey: Add a Meteostat RapidAPI key to locate the nearest weather station.
weather.apiUsagePlaceholder: API requests remaining will appear here when RapidAPI exposes quota headers.
weather.bulkBlockedFallback: Meteostat bulk weather files were blocked by the browser or are temporarily unavailable. Falling back to RapidAPI for missing daily data where possible.
weather.compareDescription: Compare detections with temperature, dew point, humidity, precipitation, pressure, wind, gusts, and weather conditions from Meteostat.
weather.enterApiKey: Enter your Meteostat RapidAPI key first.
weather.errorDenied: RapidAPI denied Meteostat access.{detail} Confirm that the selected RapidAPI application is subscribed to Meteostat and that this exact key belongs to that application.
weather.errorInvalidKey: The Meteostat RapidAPI key is invalid. Check the key copied from your RapidAPI application.
weather.errorMonthlyQuota: The Meteostat RapidAPI monthly quota has been reached.{detail}
weather.fillingMissingDates: Filling {count} missing weather dates through the Meteostat API...
weather.findingStations: Finding the three nearest Meteostat stations for the {source} location...
weather.helpText: Your personal RapidAPI key lets the dashboard locate nearby Meteostat stations and request missing or selected hourly weather. Windows of two days or less use hourly values; longer windows use daily averages. Results are cached in this browser and refresh automatically after seven days, while "Update weather now" requests fresh data immediately. Each station lookup, metadata request, and hourly or daily data request can count against your RapidAPI plan. The application which owns the key must be subscribed to Meteostat's Basic plan.
weather.hourlyLoadFailed: Hourly weather could not be loaded.
weather.hourlyReadyAvailable: Hourly weather ready: {available} of {total} hours available.
weather.hourlyReadyAveraged: Hourly weather ready: {available} of {total} hours averaged from {count} nearby stations.

weather.loadedFromCache: Weather loaded from local cache ({days} days, updated {age}).
weather.loadFailed: Weather data could not be loaded.

weather.needsCoordinates: Weather needs latitude and longitude in the loaded observations.

about.introBeforeBirdnet: Birds.name je višejezični vodič za imena ptica izgrađen na
about.introAfterBirdnet: prijevodnim datotekama, opisima s Wikipedije, IUCN podacima o zaštiti, medijima o pticama i osobnim bilješkama promatranja.
backup.title: Backup and restore local data
backup.intro: Export a JSON backup of data saved in this browser, including diary notes, saved settings, cached translations, My BirdNET uploaded data, station caches, and weather caches.
backup.excludes: API keys and tokens are never exported or imported.
backup.exported: Backup file created. API keys and tokens were excluded.
backup.importFailed: Backup import failed. Check that this is a valid Birds.name backup JSON file.
nostr.title: Featheration sign in
nostr.intro: Nostr lets you use one identity across compatible apps. Birds.name will use it later for optional federation features around your bird observations.
nostr.privateWarningTitle: Your private key is your account.
nostr.privateWarningText: Anyone who gets your private key can post, edit, or delete as you in Nostr apps. Birds.name generates the key in this browser and does not upload it. To write events safely, put the private key in a signer extension or app and let Birds.name ask that signer for signatures.
nostr.privateReminder: Copy the private key before closing this window. It will not be stored by Birds.name.
nostr.savePublic: Save only public key in browser
nostr.generated: Nostr key generated locally. Copy the private key now and store it safely.
nostr.generationFailed: Nostr key generation failed in this browser.
nostr.privateCopied: Private key copied. Keep it secret.
nostr.copyFailed: Copy failed. Select the key and copy it manually.
nostr.publicSaved: Public key saved in this browser. Private key was not stored.
nostr.stepCreate: Generate a new Nostr ID here if you do not already have one.
nostr.stepBackup: Copy the private key and save it somewhere safe, such as a password manager. If you lose it, the account cannot be recovered and you will need to create a new one.
nostr.stepSigner: Install a signer app, add your private key (nsec1...), and use it to connect with Birds.name so you can publish and interact with other members in the Featherverse without storing your private key here.
nostr.noPublicKeyText: New to Nostr? Generate a new ID. Already have one? Log in with a signer, Amber, or your private key.
nostr.loginIntro: Use Nostr Connect for web/mobile signers, a browser extension on desktop, Amber as an Android fallback, or a private key only for this session.
nostr.loginExtensionText: Use Alby, nos2x, or another NIP-07 signer.
nostr.loginConnectText: Use a NIP-46 remote signer over relays.
nostr.loginAmberText: Open Amber for online or offline Android signing.
nostr.loginPrivateButton: Use private key for this session
nostr.privateLoginNote: This stores the private key only in this browser tab session. Prefer a signer for regular use.
nostr.extensionMissing: No Nostr browser signer was found. Install Alby, nos2x, or another NIP-07 extension and try again.
nostr.extensionSignedIn: Signed in with browser extension. Public key saved in this browser.
nostr.extensionFailed: Browser extension sign-in failed or was rejected.
nostr.amberOpening: Opening Amber. Approve the connection there, then return to Birds.name and finish with the paste/clipboard button.
nostr.amberFailed: Amber did not return a usable public key. Try the paste/clipboard button, or log in with a private key for this session.
nostr.amberNoCallback: Amber returned without opening a callback. Use the clipboard button below to finish login.
nostr.amberClipboardFailed: No usable Amber login result was found. Try Amber login again, then paste the copied public key or result when asked.
nostr.privateSignedIn: Signed in with private key for this browser session. Public key saved.
nostr.privateSignInFailed: Private-key sign-in failed. Check that the key starts with nsec1 or is a valid 64-character hex key.
nostr.loggedOut: Logged out. Nostr public and session keys were removed from this browser.
nostr.publishIntro: Select the diary notes you want to publish. Published Nostr events can be copied by relays and other clients.
nostr.locationWarningText: One or more selected notes include coordinates. Publishing them may reveal where you observed the bird.
nostr.publishAggregate: Also publish my observed species totals for collective Birds.name statistics.
nostr.loginRequired: Log in to Nostr before publishing diary notes.
nostr.noPublishableNotes: There are no saved diary notes to publish.
nostr.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one diary note to publish.
nostr.confirmLocationPublish: Some selected diary notes include coordinates. Publish them anyway?
nostr.publishing: Publishing selected diary notes to Nostr...
nostr.signerRequired: A Nostr signer or private-key session is required before publishing.
nostr.relaysIntro: Personal relays are used first for publishing and reading Birds.name events. App default relays are optional fallbacks.
nostr.invalidRelay: Enter a valid secure relay URL starting with wss://
nostr.findRelaysText: To look for public relays, visit
nostr.relaysExplainer: Relays are Nostr servers that receive, store, and share events. Birds.name uses relays to publish your diary events and to find them again when you log in with the same Nostr identity.
nostr.publishProgress: Publishing {done} of {total}. Last event reached {relays} relays.
nostr.confirmDeletePublished: This diary note has already been published to Nostr. Publish a deletion request to relays too?
nostr.deletePublishFailed: The Nostr deletion request could not be published to any relay.
nostr.deletePublishFailedContinue: The Nostr deletion request failed. Delete the local diary note anyway?
nostr.blockedDiariesIntro: These are Nostr diary events hidden locally because you deleted them here. Unblock only if you want them to appear again when fetching from relays.
nostr.settingsIntro: Manage Nostr relays and locally blocked diary events used by Birds.name federation features.
nostr.fetchingAppData: Checking relays for Birds.name diary data...
nostr.importedAppData: Imported {notes} diary notes, {species} observed species, and {badges} badges from Nostr.
nostr.noAppDataFound: No Birds.name diary data was found on the configured relays.
nostr.fetchAppDataFailed: Could not fetch Birds.name diary data from Nostr relays.
nostr.allSelectedAlreadyPublished: All selected diary notes are already published to Nostr.
nostr.willUpdatePublished: Will replace the published Nostr event
achievements.title: Birding achievements
achievements.intro: Badges are self-attested Birds.name achievements. Locked badges are blurred; unlocked badges are issued to your Nostr identity when you publish eligible diary data.
achievements.readyToIssue: Unlocked locally. Will be issued on your next Nostr diary publish.
station.nostrFavouritesNeedSigner: Favourite saved locally. Open Birds.name Nostr login with a signer or private-key session to sync favourites.
station.nostrFavouritesSynced: Synced {count} favourite stations to {relays} Nostr relays.
station.nostrFavouritesSyncFailed: Favourite stations were saved locally, but Nostr sync failed.
nostr.amberClipboardReady: If Amber copied the public key, use the button below. If clipboard access is blocked, you can paste it manually.
nostr.amberPastePrompt: Paste the public key or result copied by Amber. It can be an npub1 key, a 64-character hex pubkey, or a result=... callback string.
nostr.connectIntro: Open this request in your signer, then keep this page open while the signer approves the connection.
nostr.connectWaiting: Waiting for your signer to approve the Nostr Connect request...
nostr.connectStillWaiting: Still waiting for the signer. Keep this page open, or copy the request into your signer manually.
nostr.connectFailed: Nostr Connect could not start in this browser.
nostr.connectMissing: Nostr Connect is not connected. Log in again with Nostr Connect, a browser extension, or a private key session.
nostr.connectTimeout: The Nostr Connect signer did not answer in time.
nostr.connectRelayFailed: The Nostr Connect request could not reach any configured relay.
nostr.connectSignFailed: The Nostr Connect signer did not return a valid signed event.
featheration.settingsIntro: These filters are used by the public Featheration notes page.
featheration.title: Featheration
featheration.searchPlaceholder: Search public Nostr notes about birds...
featheration.feedEmpty: Start with Featheration or search Nostr.
featheration.loadFailed: Could not load public notes from the configured relays.
featheration.noNotes: No matching public notes found yet.
featheration.loginForActions: Log in with Nostr to reply, repost, or react.
featheration.minWotHelp: 0 shows every matching note. Higher values prefer authors with profile or follow signals, but matching notes are still shown if the threshold would hide everything.
featheration.maxHashtagsHelp: Hide notes with more than this many hashtags. Set 0 to disable this filter.
featheration.hiddenUsersHelp: Hidden users remain collapsed in Featheration. This list is stored only in this browser.
featheration.lookbackHelp: Older searches ask relays for a wider time range and can be slower or return fewer results depending on each relay.
featheration.birdDetailsUnavailable: Bird details are not available right now.
featheration.wikipediaSummaryUnavailable: Wikipedia summary is not available for this bird yet.
featheration.composeIntro: Post a public Nostr note to the relays configured in Settings > Nostr.
featheration.composeLoginRequired: Log in with Nostr before writing a note.
featheration.composeEmpty: Write a note or add an image URL before publishing.
featheration.cloudinaryIntro: Choose an image and upload it to the website image host. The returned URL is added to your note.
featheration.cloudinaryUploaded: Image uploaded. The URL was added to the note text.
featheration.cloudinaryNotConfigured: Image upload is not configured yet. The website owner needs to set the Cloudinary cloud name and unsigned upload preset in featheration.js.
diary.imageUploaded: Image uploaded. The image Markdown was added to the note.
diary.imageUploadNotConfigured: Image upload is not configured yet.
diary.summaryNeedsAi: Diary summaries need AI. Enable Pollinations AI from this dialog, then try summarizing again.
diary.writeFromBirdHelp: To write a diary note, first choose a bird from the encyclopedia, open its details, then add the note from that bird diary section.
